title: The Amber Forest
description: This is a mod adds my own twist on the material known as amber. Adding a new biome, with new amber themed blocks, new amber food, and some new amber mobs to play with. you can also find some funny easter eggs. have fun!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Hvn28s-N_Qc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>Welcome to the amber forest this mod adds a new biome called you guessed it the amber forest in this new biome you will find lots of new blocks, tools, and mobs but don't let it get dark or you might encounter some explosive friends...

I have been working on this project for a while now so it would really help if you considered subscribing to my YT channel https://youtube.com/@ryguyeffect?si=BVSfN61MHgzQaeCv

also feel free to check my Kofi https://ko-fi.com/ryguyeffect

thanks!
